text:
LABEL: 
Third-Party Liability — Other Coverage Indicator ― January–December (01–12) 
DESCRIPTION: A monthly flag to indicate that the Medicaid/CHIP eligible person has some other form of third-party 
liability (TPL) funding besides insurance coverage. There are separate variables for each of the 12 
months during the year. 
SHORT NAME: 
TPL_OTHR_CVRG_IND_01 
TPL_OTHR_CVRG_IND_02 
TPL_OTHR_CVRG_IND_03 
TPL_OTHR_CVRG_IND_04 
TPL_OTHR_CVRG_IND_05 
TPL_OTHR_CVRG_IND_06 
TPL_OTHR_CVRG_IND_07
